LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS DEFENDANT ASSOCIATED BUILDING SUPPLY, INC. DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER OVERRULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED IN PART. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO 3RD AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT TO PLEAD THAT CROSS-DEFENDANT OWED A DUTY TO CROSS-COMPLAINANT OR IN SOME WAY THAT CROSS-DEFENDANT'S ACTIONS CONTRIBUTED TO CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S LIABILITY TO PLAINTIFF. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT TO PLEAD WHETHER THE CONTRACT WAS WRITTEN, ORAL, OR IMPLIED BY CONDUCT. CROSS-DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE SUSTAINED. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
